MemberRetailDiscount.description: The membership discount for retail as a percentage.

MemberServiceDiscount.description: The membership discount for services as a percentage.

AllowClientsToScheduleUnpaid.description: Allow clients in this membership to schedule unpaid.

OnlineBookingRestrictedToMembersOnly.description: List of programs that are restricted to clients in this membership only.

DayOfMonthSchedulingOpensForNextMonth.description: Day of month scheduling opens for next month. Unrestricted is a null value.

RestrictSelfSignInToMembersOnly.description: Restrict self sign in to members only.

AllowMembersToBookAppointmentsWithoutPay.description: Allow members to book appointments without paying.

AllowMembersToPurchaseNonMembersServices.description: Allow members to purchase non-members services.

AllowMembersToPurchaseNonMembersProducts.description: Allow members to purchase non-members products.

IsActive.description: Indicates if the membership is active.

EarlyAccessDaysBeforeSchedulingWindow.description: Number of days before the scheduling window that members with this membership get early access.
